Scratch — tie broken by most second places after equal first places (RRS A8.2)

RRS A8.2: After counting first-place finishes (equal here at one each), proceed to count second-place finishes. Alice has two second-place finishes against Bob's one, so Alice ranks ahead despite equal total points and equal first-place counts.

Scoring configuration: No discards. DNF/OCS scoring: A5.2 (series entries).

4 boats, so N+1 = 5 (DNC penalty).

Alice: 1st, 2nd, 2nd, DNC → 1+2+2+5=10   (1 first, 2 seconds)
Bob:   2nd, 1st, 4th, 3rd → 2+1+4+3=10   (1 first, 1 second)
Carol: 3rd, 3rd, 1st, 2nd → 3+3+1+2=9    (1 first, 1 second — but lower total, ranks 1st)
David: 4th, 4th, 3rd, 4th → 4+4+3+4=15

Carol wins outright (9 < 10). Alice and Bob tied at 10.
Tie-break step 1 — count 1s: Alice=1, Bob=1 → equal.
Tie-break step 2 — count 2s: Alice=2, Bob=1 → Alice wins.
    Alice gets DNC (N+1 = 5 pts); Carol 2nd, Bob 3rd
Rank Sail Helm R1 R2 R3 R4 Total
1st 303 Carol 3 3 1 2 9
2nd 101 Alice 1 2 2 5 DNC 10
3rd 202 Bob 2 1 4 3 10
4th 404 David 4 4 3 1 12

R1 — 1 Jan 2025

Place Sail Helm Rank Points
1 101 Alice 1 1
2 202 Bob 2 2
3 303 Carol 3 3
4 404 David 4 4

Place Sail Helm Rank Points
1 202 Bob 1 1
2 101 Alice 2 2
3 303 Carol 3 3
4 404 David 4 4

Place Sail Helm Rank Points
1 303 Carol 1 1
2 101 Alice 2 2
3 404 David 3 3
4 202 Bob 4 4

R4 — 1 Jan 2025

Place Sail Helm Rank Points
1 404 David 1 1
2 303 Carol 2 2
3 202 Bob 3 3
DNC 101 Alice 5
